meta_description: As the automotive industry continues to evolve with recent pushes toward electric and autonomous vehicles, suppliers are relying on rapid injection molding to prototype new designs and accelerate product development.

sections.heading: Injection Molding for Automotive Parts
sections.text: Injection Molding for Automotive Parts Accelerate speed to market, reduce downstream risk, and shorten development cycles with Protolabs injection molding Upload a Part

sections.heading: Prototyping to Production
sections.text: Prototyping to Production Our molding process allows you to prototype in production materials to support smoother production ramping of automotive parts for traditional vehicles, electric vehicles (EVs), autonomous vehicles (AVs), off-road vehicles, and motorcycles. Meet aggressive timelines with lead times as fast as one day.

sections.heading: Why do Automotive, Powersport, Motorcycle, and Marine Companies use Protolabs?
sections.text: Why do Automotive, Powersport, Motorcycle, and Marine Companies use Protolabs? As industry trends like autonomous driving and hybrid/electric vehicles continue to drive innovation, automotive and recreational vehicle companies are turning to Protolabs to streamline development.

sections.heading: End-to-End Product Development
sections.text: End-to-End Product Development Enabling faster design validation, improved part performance, and more efficient manufacturing workflows, Protolabs helps bring products to market more efficiently.

sections.heading: Pre-Production Builds
sections.text: Pre-Production Builds Working with the exact material needed from the start allows for simpler validation builds. You'll benefit from real-world testing and low-volume production without the delays or costs of full-scale tooling.

sections.heading: Design for Manufacturability
sections.text: Design for Manufacturability DFM feedback on every quote helps automotive engineers optimize every part design. As a result, scaling is made simpler and momentum isn't lost down the road when it's time to do validation builds.

sections.heading: Quality Inspections
sections.text: Quality Inspections PPAP, Critical to quality (CTQ), and FAI. When timelines are tight and margins for error are small, these certifications help with faster launches, fewer surprises, and smoother production ramp-ups.

sections.heading: Build Resilience into Your Supply Chain with a Reliable, Onshore Partner
sections.text: Build Resilience into Your Supply Chain with a Reliable, Onshore Partner We understand that injection molding projects can be complex. That's why our customers get a dedicated US-based applications engineer that can provide guidance throughout their project, including in-depth design reviews to improve manufacturability of your parts. Standard lead times of 7 days or less Dedicated team of applications engineers

sections.heading: Injection Molding Materials for Automotive Parts
sections.text: Injection Molding Materials for Automotive Parts We offer hundreds of thermoplastic and thermoset resins to meet the broad needs to automotive applications that range from under-the-hood to cosmetic parts.

sections.heading: Common Automotive Applications
sections.text: Common Automotive Applications We have serviced 100% of fortune 100 automotive companies. We've worked with both OEMs and aftermarket companies for componentry manufacturing for custom car parts. Common automotive applications include:
